scripts.dev: bun run --cwd src/views css && concurrently "bun run --cwd src/views css:watch" "electrobun dev"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd src/views css && electrobun build
scripts.build:canary: bun run --cwd src/views css && electrobun build --env=canary
scripts.build:stable: bun run --cwd src/views css && electrobun build --env=stable
